disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Progressive breathlessness on exertion over about three months with a sharp deterioration in the last week
trigger_question_examples: How long has this been going on and has it changed recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: For a few months I've been getting more and more out of breath, but this last week it's been really bad — I can hardly walk anywhere.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New episode of near-fainting (light-headedness to the point of feeling about to black out) brought on by walking, today
trigger_question_examples: What happened when you felt dizzy today?
Have you felt faint or like you might pass out?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Today while I was walking across the house I went really lightheaded and thought I was going to black out — I had to grab the furniture.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Swelling of both ankles and a sensation of abdominal fullness/bloating
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any swelling anywhere?
Any changes in your tummy or legs?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My ankles are all swollen and puffy, and my belly feels full and bloated.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe generalised fatigue and reduced exercise tolerance
trigger_question_examples: How far could you walk before this started compared with now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm completely washed out all the time, and I get exhausted doing almost nothing now.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No chest pain, no need to sleep propped upright, and no waking at night gasping for breath
trigger_question_examples: Do you get any chest pain?
Do you have to sleep sitting up, or wake at night short of breath?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No chest pain, and no — I can lie flat and I don't wake up gasping. It's really only when I move around that it hits me.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I don't think so, it's mostly the breathlessness and the dizziness that worry me.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lives alone and is fearful of exertion because of the dizziness and breathlessness
trigger_question_examples: Is there someone at home with you?
How are you managing at home?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I live on my own, and I'm frightened to do anything now in case I get dizzy and fall with no one around.
